projects.name: Gym System Design
projects.description: Developed a gym management web application using .NET Core, C#, MVC architecture, and SQL Server. Implemented dynamic UI with Razor, integrated Entity Framework Core for database operations, and included features like token-based authentication, access control, and basic SEO optimization.

projects.name: SharePoint Server Configuration, Deployment, Management
projects.description: Configured, deployed, and managed a SharePoint Server environment. Tasks included setting up network and domain, integrating Active Directory for user management, installing SQL Server, creating Web Applications and Site Collections, and implementing access control. Ensured security with HTTPS/SSL certificates and established backup/restore procedures.

projects.name: WiFi Network Design and Security for SMEs
projects.description: Designed and secured a WiFi network for small and medium-sized enterprises using Cisco Packet Tracer. Implemented solutions for device and network security, dynamic IP allocation (DHCP), network segmentation (VLAN, ACL), access control, WLC-based WiFi security (WPA2/WPA3), and firewall configuration using Cisco ASA.

education.major: Information Technology (Computer Network and Data Communication)
